creator: anastasios@mageirias.com
text:
Created attachment 178029
new patch

in order to remove the 'files/patch-XORSearch.c' and the 'files' folder i executed:
'svn delete files/XORSearch.c'
'svn delete files'

but after 'patch < xorsearch-1.11.1_2.diff' i had to remove the 'files' folder and this specific file (patch-XORSearch.c) in order for 'make patch' to pass cleanly.

I don't know if this is the default behavior.

So after that:

portlint: looks fine
port test: OK
poudriere 10,3-RELEASE i386: OK
poudriere 10,3-RELEASE amd64: OK
poudriere 11,0-RELEASE i386: OK
poudriere 11.0-RELEASE amd64: OK

If you want also i can submit the logs.

Thank you for taking care of it and sorry for submiting the faulty patch.
